platforms.protected_input: secret value entered directly in GitHub
platforms.test_action: Run the smallest workflow_dispatch or pull-request smoke test that references the value.
platforms.cleanup_action: Recommend only; never delete repository or environment secrets automatically.

platforms.status_source: project and deployment metadata plus bounded runtime check
platforms.test_action: Create a preview or run a read-only health endpoint; do not print the value.
platforms.cleanup_action: Require rotation evidence before removing any legacy variable.

platforms.status_source: service readiness endpoint and deployment logs
platforms.protected_input: value entered directly in Railway Variables
platforms.test_action: Deploy to staging and call the smallest read-only health or provider-status endpoint.
platforms.cleanup_action: Require no references, passing tests, backup and owner approval.
